description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to any branch or specific tags and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow has three jobs: prepare, build, and publish. The prepare job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, runs a prepare script, and creates a release. The build job, which depends on prepare, uses a matrix strategy to build the project on different platforms, installs dependencies, and uploads release assets. The publish job, which depends on build and prepare, publishes the project if specified.
